description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: lint, test, and deploy, and a global before_script that runs pip install -r test-requirements.txt. Add a lint job using the python:3.6 image that runs tox -epep8 in the lint stage. Add three test jobs in the test stage: test_python34 using python:3.4 runs tox -epy34, test_python35 using python:3.5 runs tox -epy35, and test_python36 using python:3.6 runs tox -epy36. Add a pages job in the deploy stage using python:3.6 that runs pip install sphinx, pip install ., cd docs/, make html, and moves the generated _build/html/ to a public/ directory, publishes the public/ folder as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
